main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'sílice amorfa/polimerizada etapa 2 + recovery 82% + sílice rechazo 295 > límite antiincrustante 260' literal y cuantitativo.

recommended_action.justification: Reducir recovery 75% + CIP alcalino NaOH pH 11.5-12 + agente complejante sílice — match exacto gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide SEM-EDS sólidos CIP %Si — match accepted (SEM-EDS, ataque HF).

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-umbral: Si <15% + Ca/CO3 predominante → switch a CaCO3.
